channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Travel from eerie ambient electronics and classic soul to ex…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Travel from eerie ambient electronics and classic soul to experimental jazz, alt-R&B, hip-hop, and towering doom metal. This week's Essential Releases showcase what we're listening to right now.
item.content:encoded: Travel from eerie ambient electronics and classic soul to experimental jazz, alt-R&B, hip-hop, and towering doom metal. This week's Essential Releases showcase what we're listening to right now.

item.title: Few reunions feel this earned. Discover how Parts & Labor re…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Few reunions feel this earned. Discover how Parts & Labor reunited in secret to create an ambitious new double album that bridges every era of the band's evolution.

item.title: In his withdrawal notice, Platner said "people are desperate…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In his withdrawal notice, Platner said "people are desperate for change" and that's why they made him the Democratic nominee. Now, Maine Democrats have to pick someone to replace him by July 27. n.pr/4ffncWR
item.content:encoded: In his withdrawal notice, Platner said "people are desperate for change" and that's why they made him the Democratic nominee. Now, Maine Democrats have to pick someone to replace him by July 27. n.pr/4ffncWR

item.title: Album of the Day: Another Planet (Phiik & Lungs) & steel tip…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Another Planet (Phiik & Lungs) & steel tipped dove,"People Are Not Your Friends." The Long Island hip-hop duo and rising New York producer show unstoppable force on this incisive joint project.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Another Planet (Phiik & Lungs) & steel tipped dove,"People Are Not Your Friends." The Long Island hip-hop duo and rising New York producer show unstoppable force on this incisive joint project.

item.title: “I thought they were like Black Sabbath, but they ain’t,” Ch…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
“I thought they were like Black Sabbath, but they ain’t,” Charley Crockett said after dropping Twin Temple from shows due to their satanic imagery.

Today Jack White blessed the devilish doo-wop duo with a gig offer following their fall run with Danzig.

stereogum.com/2504853/jack...
item.content:encoded:
“I thought they were like Black Sabbath, but they ain’t,” Charley Crockett said after dropping Twin Temple from shows due to their satanic imagery.

Today Jack White blessed the devilish doo-wop duo with a gig offer following their fall run with Danzig.

stereogum.com/2504853/jack...

item.title: Patriotic art and music is taking center stage this year und…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Patriotic art and music is taking center stage this year under the Trump Administration, as funds shift away from DEI. For some orgs, like the Reagan Presidential Library, this is their wheelhouse. n.pr/44nHfxg
item.content:encoded: Patriotic art and music is taking center stage this year under the Trump Administration, as funds shift away from DEI. For some orgs, like the Reagan Presidential Library, this is their wheelhouse. n.pr/44nHfxg

item.title: This month's country roundup spans lost classics, queer coun…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: This month's country roundup spans lost classics, queer country, homespun folk, vintage honky-tonk, and some of the finest new Americana you'll hear all summer. The Best Country Music on Bandcamp, June 2026.
item.content:encoded: This month's country roundup spans lost classics, queer country, homespun folk, vintage honky-tonk, and some of the finest new Americana you'll hear all summer. The Best Country Music on Bandcamp, June 2026.

item.title: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was a 52-year-old Mexican national wh…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was a 52-year-old Mexican national who worked in construction for more than three decades. The father of three was shot by Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents after they attempted to pull him over. n.pr/4vQcKMm
item.content:encoded: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was a 52-year-old Mexican national who worked in construction for more than three decades. The father of three was shot by Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents after they attempted to pull him over. n.pr/4vQcKMm

item.title: Update: Several victims of the fire in the southern provinc…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

Several victims of the fire in the southern province of Almeria, a popular holiday destination, were found inside burnt-out vehicles and were thought to have died while trying to flee the flames.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

Several victims of the fire in the southern province of Almeria, a popular holiday destination, were found inside burnt-out vehicles and were thought to have died while trying to flee the flames.

item.title: The Apple TV series wraps noir inside science fiction. With …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Apple TV series wraps noir inside science fiction. With subtlety and charm, Farrell plays an earnest alien just doing his best as a private eye in Los Angeles. n.pr/451v2ON
item.content:encoded: The Apple TV series wraps noir inside science fiction. With subtlety and charm, Farrell plays an earnest alien just doing his best as a private eye in Los Angeles. n.pr/451v2ON

item.title: The Temper Trap Are Back: We’ve Got ‘Unfinished Business’ F…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The Temper Trap Are Back: We’ve Got ‘Unfinished Business’

Frontman Dougy Mandagi and drummer Toby Dundas talk about Sungazer, their first album in a decade, and conquering industry pressure.

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
The Temper Trap Are Back: We’ve Got ‘Unfinished Business’

Frontman Dougy Mandagi and drummer Toby Dundas talk about Sungazer, their first album in a decade, and conquering industry pressure.

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Austin duo, Magna Carda joins The Hip Hop Show to talk innin…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Austin duo, Magna Carda joins The Hip Hop Show to talk inninoutcheamind — the album that brought them back to their jazz roots. Megz Kelli and Dougie Do bring us into their creative process and the vulnerability that shaped this album.
item.content:encoded: Austin duo, Magna Carda joins The Hip Hop Show to talk inninoutcheamind — the album that brought them back to their jazz roots. Megz Kelli and Dougie Do bring us into their creative process and the vulnerability that shaped this album.

item.title: Donald Trump doubled down on his refusal to sign a popular b…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Donald Trump doubled down on his refusal to sign a popular bipartisan housing-affordability bill “in protest” of Congress’ inability to force through his desired voter disenfranchisement legislation.

Read ↓
item.content:encoded:
Donald Trump doubled down on his refusal to sign a popular bipartisan housing-affordability bill “in protest” of Congress’ inability to force through his desired voter disenfranchisement legislation.

Read ↓

item.title: When the U.S. brokered a ceasefire last year, Israel control…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: When the U.S. brokered a ceasefire last year, Israel controlled half of Gaza. Now Israeli forces have pushed deeper, and Palestinians are paying a deadly price.
item.content:encoded: When the U.S. brokered a ceasefire last year, Israel controlled half of Gaza. Now Israeli forces have pushed deeper, and Palestinians are paying a deadly price.

item.title: 'Loveland,' due July 10, is Suki Waterhouse‘s third album, b…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
'Loveland,' due July 10, is Suki Waterhouse‘s third album, but that doesn’t mean she’s finding the creative process any easier. “The more you know, the less you know,” she says in a new episode of the Rolling Stone Studio.

Watch ↓
item.content:encoded:
'Loveland,' due July 10, is Suki Waterhouse‘s third album, but that doesn’t mean she’s finding the creative process any easier. “The more you know, the less you know,” she says in a new episode of the Rolling Stone Studio.

Watch ↓

item.title: Meet Count Binface: the challenger from another planet takin…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Meet Count Binface: the challenger from another planet taking on Nigel Farage as questions over the Reform UK leader's finances overshadow his election comeback. n.pr/44n6foc
item.content:encoded: Meet Count Binface: the challenger from another planet taking on Nigel Farage as questions over the Reform UK leader's finances overshadow his election comeback. n.pr/44n6foc

item.title: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characte…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.
item.content:encoded: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.

item.title: A wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 11 people, …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 11 people, making it one of the country's deadliest on record, as soaring temperatures grip much of the country. n.pr/4wAGsFd
item.content:encoded: A wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 11 people, making it one of the country's deadliest on record, as soaring temperatures grip much of the country. n.pr/4wAGsFd

item.title: Jack White invites Satanic doo-wop duo Twin Temple to open a…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Jack White invites Satanic doo-wop duo Twin Temple to open a show after Charley Crockett drops them for being Satanic
item.content:encoded: Jack White invites Satanic doo-wop duo Twin Temple to open a show after Charley Crockett drops them for being Satanic

item.title: The investigation continues into the death of a Black teenag…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The investigation continues into the death of a Black teenager in Mississippi whose body was found after he was left on an island.
item.content:encoded: The investigation continues into the death of a Black teenager in Mississippi whose body was found after he was left on an island.
